message:
🐛 Fix hover card showing inconsistent stats vs leaderboard table (#1547)

The ContributorHoverCard was fetching rank, points, and level from a
separate /data/contributors/{login}.json endpoint, which could return
stale or different values than the leaderboard table row.

Pass rank, totalPoints, and level from the leaderboard entry directly
into ContributorHoverCard so both always display the same data.

Signed-off-by: clubanderson <clubanderson@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: clubanderson <clubanderson@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
